name: Aryan Sahu

custom_answers.introduction: Aryan Sahu — Full Stack Developer with 3+ years shipping production systems. I've built platforms from scratch (React, Node, PostgreSQL, AWS), handled zero-downtime deployments, and migrated legacy stacks to Next.js. I work end-to-end and prefer shipping over meetings.
custom_answers.motivation: I'm looking for teams where I can own features end-to-end and work with modern stacks. Your role lines up with what I've been building lately.

raw_bio:
Full Stack Developer with 3+ years of production experience building and shipping web applications at scale. Delivered features for enterprise clients (Vodafone India, Bank of Maharashtra) supporting 10M+ daily banking transactions; currently architecting production Next.js systems for a Dubai-based startup. Strong end-to-end ownership from React/Next.js frontends and Node.js API design to PostgreSQL schema architecture and AWS/Nginx production deployments.

Full Stack Developer at Infravue Technologies (July 2025 - Present)
- Architected and deployed production Next.js, Node.js and Python backend applications with PM2/Nginx across multiple subdomains, achieving zero-downtime deployments
- Built Cloudflare Workers backend for serverless form processing, maintaining legacy infrastructure in parallel
- Migrated legacy HTML/CSS/Three.js codebase to Next.js, reducing maintenance overhead by 40% while enhancing 3D animation performance

Full Stack Developer (Co-Founder) at Kangagigs (March 2025 - July 2025)
- Architected and shipped a full-stack job discovery platform (React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Prisma) with JWT-secured REST APIs, independently deployed on AWS EC2
- Scaled to 500+ registered users; led 3 UI/UX iterations reducing page load time by 35%

Application Engineer at Newgen Software Technologies (February 2023 - March 2025)
- Delivered production features for enterprise clients (Vodafone India, Bank of Maharashtra) in Java and JavaScript, supporting systems processing 10M+ daily banking transactions

Bachelor of Engineering in Electronics and Telecommunication, D. Y. Patil College of Engineering, 8.67 CGPA

Skills: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Redux, Framer Motion, GSAP, Three.js, Node.js, Express.js, NestJS, REST APIs, JWT, PostgreSQL, Prisma, MongoDB, AWS EC2, Docker, Nginx, PM2, Cloudflare Workers, Linux, Java
